mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_FILE (APPROVAL_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, APPROVAL_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, UPLOADED_AT FROM APPROVAL_FILE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = #{approvalId} ORDER BY FILE_ID
